mapper.select: SELECT store, mainBarcode, subBarcode, product, location, regDate FROM FIXED_CATEGORY WHERE store = #{store} ORDER BY CASE WHEN location IS NULL OR location = '' OR location = '시즌아웃' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CAST(location AS UNSIGNED), location
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FIXED_CATEGORY (store, mainBarcode, subBarcode, product, location, regDate) VALUES (#{store}, #{mainBarcode}, #{subBarcode}, #{product}, #{location}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FIXED_CATEGORY WHERE store = #{store} AND location = #{location} AND mainBarcode != #{mainBarcode}
